subcodes.first_line: In the Qur'án it is recorded that seven tribes came into the presence of that Secret of Existence and Essence of Purpose, His Holiness the Prophet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در قرآن مذکور که هفت قبيله به حضور سرّ وجود و جوهر مقصود حضرت رسول عليه السّلام آمدند
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @miracles and their interpretation, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @station of the Manifestation of God
